name: Skippy
special: Scales to player level. Two modes: Stone Cold Killer (headshots) and Puppy-Loving Pacifist (limb shots). Switches mode after 50 kills.
location: Found in an alley in Vista del Rey, Heywood during the side job 'Machine Gun'

name: Lizzie
special: Fires an extra round per shot when fully charged. Increased charge damage and charge speed.
location: Found in Lizzie's Bar basement after completing 'Automatic Love' main job

name: Widow Maker
special: Fully charged shots release an additional projectile. Deals chemical damage and can apply poison.
location: Looted from Nash during the side job 'Riders on the Storm' in the Raffen Shiv camp

name: Overwatch
special: Silenced sniper rifle with increased damage and reduced bullet spread. Fires through walls.
location: Given by Panam Palmer after completing 'Riders on the Storm' side job

name: Comrade's Hammer
special: Only holds one round per cylinder. Massive single-shot damage. Charged shots deal explosive damage.
location: Crafting spec found during NCPD Scanner Hustle in Arroyo, Santo Domingo

name: Malorian Arms 3516
special: Johnny Silverhand's pistol. Ricochet rounds, thermal damage bonus, chance to apply burn, shoots through cover.
location: Obtained during 'Chippin' In' main job after defeating Grayson on the Ebunike ship

name: Kongou
special: Increased number of rounds per shot. Smart-link targeting improved with faster lock-on.
location: Found on the nightstand in Yorinobu's penthouse during 'The Heist' main job

name: Plan B
special: Each shot costs 5% max health. Increased critical chance and critical damage.
location: Found on Dex DeShawn's body in the No-Tell Motel during Act 2 opening

name: Dying Night
special: Increased headshot damage and reduced reload time. Bonus damage to enemies with full health.
location: Found in V's apartment mega building, on a table in the gun shop on the ground floor

name: Buzzsaw
special: Increased fire rate and ricochet damage. Rounds ricochet an additional time.
location: Looted from a Tyger Claw leader during an NCPD hustle in Kabuki, Watson

name: Breakthrough
special: Rounds penetrate through enemies and walls with minimal damage loss. Increased critical damage.
location: Dropped by a cyberpsycho during Cyberpsycho Sighting: Letter of the Law in Santo Domingo

name: Divided We Stand
special: Locks onto up to 5 targets simultaneously. Applies poison and increased smart-link lock-on speed.
location: Reward for winning the shooting competition in the 'Stadium Love' side job

name: Genjiroh
special: Fires four rounds per shot. Smart rounds track targets more aggressively.
location: Found in Arasaka Industrial Park during 'Play It Safe' or 'Search and Destroy' main jobs

name: Sir John Phallustiff
special: Non-lethal weapon. Chance to stun on hit. Deals electrical damage on strong attacks.
location: Found in a box in Meredith Stout's hotel room after completing 'Venus in Furs'

name: Scalpel
special: Increased attack speed while Sandevistan is active. Applies bleeding and electrical damage.
location: Reward from Judy after completing 'Pisces' side job (requires siding with Judy)

name: Fenrir
special: Deals thermal damage and has increased chance to apply burn. Reduced reload time.
location: Looted from Maelstrom leader during 'Sacrum Profanum' gig in Northside, Watson

name: Ba Xing Chong
special: Fires explosive rounds that track targets. Increased magazine size and smart-link capabilities.
location: Found in container on Ebunike ship during 'Chippin' In' job (same container as Malorian Arms 3516)

name: Psalm 11:6
special: Fires incendiary rounds that deal thermal damage and apply burn. Increased fire rate.
location: Reward from completing the gig 'Divine Retribution' or looted from 6th Street gang location

name: Moron Labe
special: Increased ricochet damage. Rounds ricochet twice. Bonus critical hit chance on ricochet.
location: Looted from a 6th Street leader during NCPD Scanner Hustle in Arroyo

name: Prejudice
special: Increased damage, fire rate, and magazine size. Bonus headshot multiplier.
location: Reward from Bes Isis during side job 'Bring Me the Head of Gustavo Orta'

name: Chaos
special: Randomized damage type and critical chance each reload. Can deal Physical, Chemical, Electrical, or Thermal.
location: Looted from Royce if you fight him during 'The Pickup' main job

name: Doom Doom
special: Fires four rounds per trigger pull. Increased headshot damage and chance to dismember.
location: Looted from Dum Dum during 'Second Conflict' gig or 'Totentanz' sequence

name: Cottonmouth
special: Deals electrical and chemical damage. Chance to apply poison and shock. Non-lethal.
location: Looted from Fingers (Finn Gerstatt) at his ripperdoc clinic in Jig-Jig Street

name: Headhunter
special: Headshots deal massively increased damage. Charged headshots can one-shot most enemies.
location: Reward from completing Phantom Liberty main questline, given by Mr. Hands

name: Amnesty
special: Increased damage per consecutive hit on the same target. Stacks up to 4 times.
location: Reward from completing a gig for Mr. Hands in Dogtown, Phantom Liberty

name: Tinker Bell
special: Kills restore health. Ricochet rounds guaranteed to hit nearby enemies after bounce.
location: Given by Regina Jones as reward for NCPD Scanner Hustles in Watson

name: Apparition
special: Increased fire rate, reload speed, and damage. Faster draw speed. Magazine empties quickly.
location: Dropped during NCPD activity in Dogtown, Phantom Liberty expansion

name: Crash
special: River Ward's revolver. Increased headshot damage and critical hit chance.
location: Given by River Ward after completing 'Following the River' side job questline

name: Cheetah
special: Increased attack speed and leap distance. Hits apply bleeding. Combos execute faster.
location: Found in a locked room during a gig in Dogtown, Phantom Liberty

name: O'Five
special: Explosive rounds on fully charged shots. Massive single-shot damage with area effect.
location: Reward from completing a Phantom Liberty gig involving a weapons dealer in Dogtown

name: Sovereign
special: Fires both barrels simultaneously. Massive close-range damage with knockback effect.
location: Given by Dino Dinovic after completing enough gigs in Watson

name: Errata
special: Deals thermal damage on hit. Strong attacks apply burn. Increased damage against burning enemies.
location: Found during a Cyberpsycho Sighting or NCPD event in Dogtown, Phantom Liberty

name: Overture
special: Standard heavy revolver. Can ricochet rounds off surfaces.
location: Available from most weapon vendors across Night City

name: Unity
special: Basic starting pistol. Reliable and easy to use.
location: V's starting weapon. Also available from all weapon vendors.

name: Nue
special: Balanced power pistol. Good accuracy and moderate damage.
location: Common drop from enemies. Available at most weapon vendors.

name: Lexington
special: High fire rate pistol. Good for rapid engagements at close to mid range.
location: Common drop from Militech enemies. Available at weapon vendors.

name: Liberty
special: Well-rounded pistol with good stopping power and accuracy.
location: Available from weapon vendors in Watson and City Center

name: Pulsar
special: Standard assault rifle. Reliable full-auto fire with moderate recoil.
location: Common drop from Militech and gang enemies. Available at weapon vendors.

name: Saratoga
special: Rapid-fire SMG with large magazine. Good for close-quarters combat.
location: Common drop from Tyger Claw and various gang members

name: Dian
special: Smart SMG with tracking rounds. Requires smart link cyberware for full functionality.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Common drop from Kang Tao operatives.

name: Shingen Mark V
special: Smart SMG that fires three-round bursts. Tracking rounds home in on targets.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Drops from Arasaka soldiers.

name: Copperhead
special: Militech assault rifle with good range and moderate fire rate. Versatile in combat.
location: Common drop from Militech soldiers. Available at most weapon vendors.

name: Masamune
special: Arasaka assault rifle with excellent accuracy and moderate fire rate.
location: Drops from Arasaka soldiers. Available from weapon vendors in City Center.

name: Ajax
special: Heavy assault rifle with increased damage per round. Slower fire rate but hits hard.
location: Drops from higher-level enemies. Available from weapon vendors in Westbrook.

name: Nokota D5 Sidewinder
special: Smart assault rifle with homing rounds. Good accuracy at all ranges with smart link.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Drops from Kang Tao and corpo enemies.

name: Nekomata
special: Tech sniper rifle. Charged shots penetrate walls and cover. Excellent for stealth builds.
location: Available from weapon vendors in Japantown and Pacifica. Drops from various enemies.

name: Grad
special: Heavy power sniper rifle with massive damage per shot. High recoil and slow fire rate.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Drops from militarized enemies in Badlands.

name: Defender
special: Light machine gun with huge magazine. Sustained fire causes overheating. Good suppression weapon.
location: Drops from heavy enemies and Militech soldiers. Available at weapon vendors.

name: Tsunami Nue
special: Tsunami Defense Systems variant of the Nue. Improved accuracy and handling.
location: Available from weapon vendors in City Center and Westbrook

name: Carnage
special: Massive spread shotgun dealing devastating close-range damage. Slow reload.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Drops from Animals gang members.

name: Igla
special: Double-barrel shotgun. Fires two shots before reloading. High burst damage.
location: Common drop from various gang members. Available at weapon vendors.

name: Satara
special: Tech shotgun. Charged shots deal increased damage and penetrate cover.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Drops from Scavenger enemies.

name: Tactician
special: Smart shotgun with tracking pellets. Requires smart link. Pellets home in on targets.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Drops from Kang Tao soldiers.

name: Katana
special: Standard katana. Fast attack speed with light and heavy combos. Can deflect bullets.
location: Available from melee weapon vendors. Common drop from Tyger Claw members.

name: Tanto
special: Fast stabbing weapon. Can be used for stealth takedowns. Quick attack speed.
location: Available from melee weapon vendors. Common drop from various enemies.

name: Machete
special: Heavy blade weapon with wide swing arc. Good for crowd control in melee.
location: Drops from Valentinos and various gang members. Available at melee vendors.

name: Baseball Bat
special: Non-lethal blunt weapon. Chance to stun enemies on strong attacks.
location: Common drop from 6th Street gang. Found in various locations across Night City.

name: Hammer
special: Slow but powerful blunt weapon. Strong attacks deal massive stun damage.
location: Drops from Animals gang members. Available from melee weapon vendors.

name: Tire Iron
special: Basic melee weapon. Non-lethal. Moderate swing speed.
location: Found in garages and industrial areas. Common drop from Wraiths in the Badlands.

name: M-10AF Lexington
special: Militech standard-issue pistol. High fire rate with controllable recoil.
location: Standard drop from Militech personnel. Available at all weapon shops.

name: M221 Saratoga
special: Upgraded Saratoga variant with improved damage and reduced recoil.
location: Drops from higher-level Tyger Claw enemies. Available from select vendors.

name: D5 Copperhead
special: Military-grade Copperhead with tighter spread and improved range performance.
location: Drops from elite Militech soldiers and can be found in military caches

name: Burya
special: Tech revolver with chargeable shots. Charged rounds pierce walls and enemies.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Drops from Maelstrom and Scavenger enemies.

name: SPT32 Grad
special: Enhanced Grad sniper with improved scope and damage at extreme range.
location: Drops from Wraith snipers in the Badlands. Available from Badlands vendors.

name: Zhuo
special: Kang Tao smart assault rifle with multi-target lock capability.
location: Drops from Kang Tao operatives. Available from select weapon vendors.

name: G-58 Dian
special: Advanced smart SMG with faster lock-on speed and improved tracking accuracy.
location: Drops from elite Kang Tao soldiers. Available at Westbrook weapon shops.

name: SOR-22
special: Semi-automatic precision rifle. Good accuracy at medium to long range.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Drops from various enemies across Night City.

name: DR5 Nova
special: Compact revolver. Good concealment and decent stopping power.
location: Common drop from various enemies. Available at all weapon vendors.

name: Tsunami Nekomata
special: Enhanced tech sniper with improved charge speed and wall penetration distance.
location: Available from high-end weapon vendors. Drops from elite enemies.

name: E-31S Ajax
special: Military-spec Ajax with improved damage output and weapon handling.
location: Drops from high-tier Militech troops. Available from select vendors.

name: M-179E Achilles
special: Precision rifle with high single-shot damage and excellent range. Semi-automatic.
location: Available from weapon vendors in Pacifica and City Center. Drops from elite enemies.

name: Palica
special: Standard assault rifle with reliable performance. Good all-around weapon.
location: Common drop from gang members. Available at weapon vendors across Night City.

name: Guillotine
special: Heavy katana variant with increased stagger chance on hit.
location: Available from melee vendors. Drops from elite Tyger Claw members.

name: Butcher's Cleaver
special: Heavy cleaver with chance to dismember on strong attacks.
location: Found in various locations. Drops from Scavenger enemies.

name: Electric Baton Alpha
special: Non-lethal baton dealing electrical damage. Chance to short-circuit enemies.
location: Drops from NCPD officers and security guards. Available at some vendors.

name: Crowbar
special: Basic blunt weapon. Non-lethal. Good for stealth takedowns.
location: Found in industrial areas and construction sites across Night City.

name: Knife
special: Basic throwing knife. Can be thrown for ranged stealth attacks.
location: Common drop from all enemy types. Available at all melee vendors.

name: DS1 Pulsar
special: Enhanced Pulsar with improved stability and extended effective range.
location: Drops from mid-tier Militech soldiers. Available from weapon vendors.

name: L-69 Zhuo
special: Advanced Kang Tao smart rifle with improved projectile tracking algorithms.
location: Drops from elite Kang Tao personnel. Available at select Westbrook vendors.

name: DB-4 Igla
special: Enhanced double-barrel with tighter pellet spread and faster reload.
location: Drops from high-level gang enemies. Available from select weapon vendors.

name: JKE-X2 Kenshin
special: Tech pistol with charge capability. Charged shots pierce cover and deal bonus damage.
location: Available from weapon vendors. Drops from Arasaka soldiers.

name: RT-46 Burya
special: Military-grade tech revolver. Charged shots deal devastating penetrating damage.
location: Drops from elite enemies. Available from high-end weapon vendors.

name: Omaha
special: Compact power pistol. Fast draw speed and decent accuracy.
location: Common drop from various enemies. Available at weapon shops across Night City.

name: Rostovic DB-2 Satara
special: Enhanced tech shotgun with faster charge time and improved penetration.
location: Drops from heavy enemies. Available at weapon vendors in Santo Domingo.

name: TKI-20 Shingen
special: Arasaka smart SMG with improved burst accuracy and target acquisition.
location: Drops from Arasaka operatives. Available from Japantown weapon vendors.
